name: repair-policy
description: Defines automatic repair behaviour for issues detected during verification — what can be auto-fixed, what requires manual intervention, and repair limits.

autoRepairable.description: Issues that can be automatically repaired without manual intervention

manualIntervention.description: Issues that require human review and cannot be auto-repaired

repairScope.description: Repairs are limited to issues introduced by the current execution, not pre-existing issues

auditEngine.description: The audit engine identifies issues but does not modify code directly

repairEngine.description: The repair engine applies fixes identified by the audit engine
